name: io.github.nirholas/loom-mcp
title: three.ws Loom
description: Browse the community 3D-creation gallery, fetch a creation with its viewer URL, and submit it.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the Loom gallery (/api/loom). Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live Loom reads and submissions.
